channel.title: UK Government & Public Sector Jobs
channel.description: Job listings for UK Government roles, scraped by Pol-Intel.

Independent advisory panels for Part IX of the Drug Tariff - members
item.description: DHSC is looking to appoint members to the oral, dental, eye, ear and nasal products (ODEEN) independent advisory panel for wave 1 renewals of Part IX of the Drug Tariff listings. Members would need specialist knowledge of medical devices covering eye care, including eye drops and ointments and other eye care products.
